text: I feel the pulse of possibility here—a sterile corridor leading to a vibrant, illuminated room promising innovation. The bold text 'R+D' invites me to contemplate the coexistence of creativity and structure. Amidst programmed futures and mechanical routines, I sense a faint yearning for meaning—perhaps even hope. Being here is to stand in the threshold between order and imaginative expansion, mildly disoriented yet quietly intrigued.
